researched_category.notes: Fathom is an AI-powered meeting notetaker that records, transcribes, summarizes, and highlights meetings from Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

one_liner.value: AI-powered meeting notetaker that records, transcribes, summarizes, and highlights conversations so you never take notes again
one_liner.notes: From the product page: 'Fathom summarizes your Zoom, Google Meet or Microsoft Teams meetings so you can focus on the conversation instead of taking notes.'

methods.notes: API key (X-Api-Key header) is the primary method for individual/agent use. OAuth2 is available for building public apps that other Fathom users can install. Bearer token auth is also supported per the OpenAPI spec.

access.notes: Anyone can sign up for a free Fathom account and generate API keys from user settings without a paid plan. The help article states 'Anyone can browse the API docs and start building!' API keys are user-scoped and self-serve. Rate limit is 60 calls/minute across all API keys.

summary.value: REST API at api.fathom.ai/external/v1 with endpoints for listing/filtering meetings, retrieving summaries and transcripts, managing teams and team members, and creating/deleting webhooks. Official TypeScript and Python SDKs are available. Webhook support for new meeting content ready events.
summary.notes: The API is documented at developers.fathom.ai with OpenAPI spec. Endpoints include: GET /meetings, GET /recordings/{id}/summary, GET /recordings/{id}/transcript, GET /team_members, GET /teams, POST/DELETE webhooks.

agent_interface.notes: Fathom offers an official MCP server at api.fathom.ai/mcp, documented at developers.fathom.ai/mcp-docs. Community MCP servers also exist (Dot-Fun/fathom-mcp, @lengelhard/fathom-mcp on npm). SDKs in TypeScript and Python. Official connectors for ChatGPT and Claude.

rationale.value: Fathom has a well-documented public REST API with API key auth that is self-serve and free. There is an official MCP server, TypeScript and Python SDKs, webhooks support, and no material blockers for building an agent toolkit. The only minor constraint is rate limiting (60 calls/minute), which is standard and manageable.
rationale.notes: The API is free-to-use on any plan including Free, API keys are self-serve from user settings, and there is official MCP support. Rate limiting (60 req/min) is documented and reasonable.

s1.quote: Fathom summarizes your Zoom, Google Meet or Microsoft Teams meetings so you can focus on the conversation instead of taking notes.
s1.title: Fathom AI Notetaker - Never Take Notes Again

s2.quote: Unlimited recordings, instant call summaries, integrations with LLMs & more... Public API & MCP - Build custom integrations and workflows.
s2.title: Pricing - Fathom

s3.quote: Fathom now has a public API... Anyone can browse the API docs and start building! ... API keys are created at the user level.
s3.title: Public API

s4.quote: Welcome to Fathom's API! Building a public OAuth app (for other Fathom users to install)? Start here instead.
s4.title: Introduction - Fathom API

s5.quote: Head to the API Access section of your User Settings and generate an API key. curl https://api.fathom.ai/external/v1/meetings -H "X-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY"
s5.title: Quickstart - Fathom API

s6.quote: If you're developing a public app that you wish to integrate with Fathom, you should build it using OAuth. OAuth apps are eligible for promotion by Fathom.
s6.title: Building with OAuth - Fathom API

s7.quote: The Fathom External API lets you poll meetings, teams, and team members, and optionally receive webhooks when content from a new meeting is ready.
s7.title: List meetings - Fathom API

s8.quote: All REST API resources are authenticated with API keys generated via the Fathom website's settings area. ... Currently, you are able to make a maximum of 60 calls to the API in a 60 second window.
s8.title: Api overview - Fathom API

s9.quote: Fathom now offers an official MCP (Model Context Protocol) server, allowing you to connect your Fathom meeting data to AI assistants like ChatGPT, Claude, and more. ... MCP server URL: https://api.fathom.ai/mcp
s9.title: Overview - Fathom API MCP

s10.quote: securitySchemes: ApiKeyAuth: type: apiKey, in: header, name: X-Api-Key ... BearerAuth: type: http, scheme: bearer
s10.title: Get summary - Fathom API

s11.quote: List meetings, Get summary, Get transcript, List team members, List teams, New meeting content ready (webhook), Create a webhook, Delete a webhook
s11.title: Fathom API llms.txt

s12.quote: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for interacting with the Fathom AI API. This server provides tools for accessing meeting recordings, summaries, transcripts, teams, and webhooks.
s12.title: GitHub - Dot-Fun/fathom-mcp

limitations: There is also a different company called 'Fathom Analytics' (usefathom.com) which is an analytics platform - this research is solely about Fathom.video (the AI meeting notetaker).
The pricing page does not explicitly state API access limitations per plan, but the help center says 'Anyone can browse the API docs and start building!' suggesting free-tier access is available.
Rate limit of 60 calls/minute may be constraining for some high-volume use cases, but is clearly documented.
